General.Name: Fortifai Ltd
General.Description: Fortifai Limited develops video games in Australia. It develops video games for consoles, PC, and mobile platforms and makes them available for customers through different app stores. The company was formerly known as Mighty Kingdom Limited and changed its name to Fortifai Limited in June 2025. The company was incorporated in 2018 and is headquartered in Sydney, Australia.

2.Name: Ms. Emilie  Poissenot
2.Title: Chief Creative Officer & Head of Gaming
